message:
fix(mvcc): gate unix_socket_ancillary_data to linux-only

SocketAncillary, send_vectored_with_ancillary, and related APIs are
Linux-only in std. Gate the feature flag and affected functions/tests
to target_os = "linux" instead of target_family = "unix" so the crate
compiles on macOS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
